title: Add The Institute of Everything to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The Institute of Everything
gist.blurb: The Institute of Everything just joined our community showcase. It generates complete, straight-faced museum exhibits for literally any concept, no matter how absurd or mundane.
gist.summary: Added 'The Institute of Everything' to the community app showcase, a new writing tool that generates fake academic museum exhibits from any prompt.
gist.impact: Creators can now generate highly detailed, deadpan academic exhibits for niche, absurd, or mundane concepts.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy museum setting where Polly the bee acts as a serious academic curator inspecting a completely absurd object on a pedestal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny academic glasses, inspecting a glowing pixelated half-eaten donut displayed on a fancy museum pedestal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny academic glasses, inspecting a glowing pixelated half-eaten donut displayed on a fancy museum pedestal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
